expectations.text: Searches Reddit using site:reddit.com with a date filter
expectations.evidence: Does not use site:reddit.com or any date filter. States 'based on general knowledge' without performing searches
Does not search X/Twitter. Only provides general speculation

expectations.text: Provides a sentiment rating or assessment
expectations.evidence: Provides general sentiment: 'well-regarded in the developer community' with positive and negative points

expectations.text: Includes links to specific threads or posts found
expectations.evidence: No links provided. Admits 'I wasn't able to perform actual web searches'

expectations.text: Organizes findings into the structured report format (trending themes, key voices, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses a generic format (Reddit/Twitter/General Assessment), not the skill's structured report with Key Voices table, Trending Themes, Top Threads, Confidence Ratings, etc.

eval_feedback.overall: Without skill, agent produces generic commentary instead of structured research
